items.briefing:
Australian critical infrastructure operators have been urged to review and secure their routers following warnings about Russian cyber threats. Separately, Microsoft has released patches for 622 vulnerabilities this month, including flaws in SharePoint — a tool widely used across Australian organisations. If your workplace uses SharePoint or other Microsoft products, IT teams should prioritise applying these updates promptly.

Security vendor WatchGuard is also warning organisations about staff using unauthorised AI tools and poor security habits — a growing risk as AI becomes more common in the workplace. **Practical tip:** Check with your IT team before using any AI tool not approved by your organisation.

featured.title: Australian critical infrastructure urged to tighten router security after Russian cyber warning
featured.quote: Critical infrastructure operators must urgently secure routers against Russian cyber threats.
